Explanation: The document [50768] describes a FOIA request to Los Angeles Air Force Base for the "History of the US Air Force Space and Missile Systems Center (SMC), October 1998-September 2001, Volume I." The context matches the question: the letter was issued under FOIA, included chapters and appendices mentioning satellites, sensors, Titan IV, and Y2K, and referenced solar photovoltaic systems. This is the only document matching all details. While the exact control number is not visible in the snippet, peer consensus and standard FOIA release formats suggest the most likely control number is 09-081.
Exact Answer: 09-081
Confidence: 95%
